creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text: lang/julia10 (the current LTS according to https://julialang.org/downloads/ ) hinges on Python 2.7 so will be removed tomorrow, it might be worthwhile to update this port to 1.5.3 (the latest non-LTS) or create a lang/julia15 instead of lang/julia10? That is, if it uses Python 3.6+
